title: bidens tenera
intro: Bidens tenera, also known as the slender beggar's lice or tender beggar's lice, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. Traditionally, the Bidens tenera plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The Bidens tenera plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Bidens tenera can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
